name: coding-agent-skills
description: A marketplace of reusable coding agent skills for orchestrating parallel tasks and delegating work to multiple AI CLI tools.

plugins.name: coding-agent-skills
plugins.description: A collection of reusable agent skills for orchestrating parallel tasks and executing work via Claude Code, Codex, Gemini, and Cursor agent CLIs.

skills.name: orchestrating-parallel-tasks
skills.description: Decomposes complex or large-scale requirements into discrete, mutually exclusive sub-tasks that can be executed in parallel by multiple agents.

skills.name: claude-code-cli
skills.description: Executes tasks using the Claude Code CLI. Automatically determines the safest permission mode based on the task type.

skills.name: codex-cli
skills.description: Executes tasks using the Codex CLI. Automatically determines the least privilege required based on the user's request.

skills.name: gemini-cli
skills.description: Executes tasks using the Gemini CLI. Automatically determines the safest approval mode based on the task type.

skills.name: cursor-agent-cli
skills.description: Executes tasks using the Cursor Agent CLI. Provides structured modes for planning, Q&A, and full automation with safety guardrails.
